name: learn
description: Institutional memory for any project. Auto-detects when to scaffold CLAUDE.md + LEARNINGS.md, capture failures and wins, brainstorm complex tasks into thoughts/, and recall prior knowledge before re-deriving it. Slash commands are /learn:init, /learn:brainstorm, /learn:capture-failure, /learn:capture-win, /learn:audit, /learn:recall, /learn:retrospective.
